En'gyō-shiki inner small shrine. * {{ill|Kotoshironushi Shrine (Naruto City)|ja|事代主神社 (鳴門市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotoshironushi Shrine (Naruto City)|qq=}} - located in [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]][[:en:Naruto, Tokushima|Naruto City]]{{ill|Nuyō Town Minamihama|ja|撫養町南浜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nuyō Town Minamihama|1=Muya-chō Minamihama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498689}}. * {{ill|Kotoshironushi Shrine (Shinkamigoto Town)|ja|事代主神社 (新上五島町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotoshironushi Shrine (Shinkamigoto Town)|qq=}} - located in [[:en:Nagasaki Prefecture|Nagasaki Prefecture]][[:en:Minami-Matsuura District, Nagasaki|Minamimatsuura District]][[:en:Shin-Kamigotō|Shinkamigoto Town]]. * {{ill|Amagasaki Ebisu Shrine|ja|尼崎戎神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amagasaki Ebisu Shrine|qq=}} - former shrine name was Kotoshironushi Shrine. Located in [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]][[:en:Amagasaki|Amagasaki City]]. {{disambiguation}}
